title: Tis The Season Of Christmas
description: Ever wanted to kill Santa or Krampus, well today is your lucky day. I have created a mod that spawns Santa and Krampus near a Christmas tree and if you kill them, they drop loot.
body:
You ever wanted to celebrate the holidays but still play minecraft, well today is your lucky day. I haved added several christmas items/mobs/structures to spruce up your minecraft gameplay during the holiday!

 **Features** 🧩
This christmas mod adds four new things to minecraft! 
- Santa, which is a new boss and he is found in the Christmas tree, he us a neutral mob that drops good loot
- Krampus, which is a new boss and he is found in the Christmas tree, he is hostile and drops good loot also
- Present Chest, is it crafted with 1 chest, 4 red wool, and 4 green wool, it is basically just a retextured cheat
- Christmas Tree, it is found in any snowy biome in features a tree, Santa, and Krampus
  
  **Installation guide** 📋
first download forge loader, then once the loader is installed, download this mod and drag and drop it in your mods folder, no config needed
